title: VWAP research paper replication idea
raw_idea_text:
# Example VWAP Research Paper Replication Idea

**Safety Boundary:**
- This is not financial advice.
- This is not a trading signal.
- This is not approved for backtesting yet.
- This is not approved for paper or real-money execution.

## The Idea
The objective is to explore the concept of Volume Weighted Average Price (VWAP) mean reversion as frequently discussed in market microstructure literature. 

A common academic claim is that extreme intraday deviations from the VWAP in high-liquidity equities tend to revert toward the mean under specific market regimes (e.g., non-trending days). 

This research idea aims to construct a framework to systematically validate or invalidate this claim using out-of-sample data.

## Goal
To learn how to reproduce a microstructure claim and build a robust hypothesis contract around it, ensuring we separate in-sample academic assertions from rigorous out-of-sample validation.

## Constraints
- We make no assumption that the academic claim is true.
- Any extracted logic will be strictly used for statistical testing and validation.
